entry.title: Cyberpunk 2077 AutoHotKey script
entry.summary: This script contains macros for various movement exploits in Cyberpunk 2077. Please open the script with a text editor and refer to…
entry.content:
This script contains macros for various movement exploits in Cyberpunk 2077.

Please open the script with a text editor and refer to the comments inside explaining its usage and configuration. 

This script was tested with Cyberpunk 2077 version 1.06.

Click the link below to obtain it:

Download
